name: Cognition Devin
description: Autonomous AI software engineer agent capable of end-to-end software development tasks including coding, debugging, planning, and deployment. Operates in a sandboxed environment with shell, code editor, and browser. Can schedule and manage multiple Devin instances in parallel.
notes: Enterprise adoption by Goldman Sachs, Santander, Nubank. Merged hundreds of thousands of pull requests in production codebases. Devin 2.0 introduced cloud-based IDE with parallel instance support.
